basics.name: Archelaos Chatzinikolaou
basics.title: Junior .NET Developer (C# / Blazor)
basics.summary: Junior developer transitioning from business operations to modern .NET web development. Focused on building web applications using C#, Blazor, ASP.NET Core and SQL. Experienced in frontend and backend development, database design and practical problem solving through real-world projects. Passionate about learning through building applications and continuously improving software engineering skills.

experience.title: Junior Web Developer
experience.subtitle: IQTaxi Inc.
bullets: Worked on full-stack web applications in a collaborative development environment.
Developed frontend interfaces using React and modern JavaScript
Built backend functionality and APIs using PHP and CodeIgniter 4
Designed and optimized relational databases with MySQL
Integrated APIs and external services into web platforms
Participated in development of production systems including zipeat.com food delivery platform and Taxi-Fleet booking and management system
Used AI tools to assist development workflow, debugging and code optimization

experience.title: Apple Sales Expert
experience.subtitle: iStorm S.A. (Apple Premium Reseller)
bullets: Provided product consulting and technical guidance for Apple ecosystem
Delivered personalized device setup and after-sales support
Maintained high customer satisfaction and consistently exceeded sales targets
Developed strong communication and problem-solving skills in a fast-paced environment

experience.title: Business Owner | Sales & Operations Manager
experience.subtitle: MANASKOS - Agricultural Machinery Spare Parts
bullets: Managed B2B sales and supplier relations across Greece and Europe
Implemented ERP integration for inventory and order management
Organized large product catalogs and structured business data
Led digital initiatives including website development and SEO strategy
Developed practical understanding of real business workflows and system requirements
